name: Siren's Kiss
overview: Ace insurance investigator Cha Woo-seok hunts a fraud ring tied to mysterious deaths and becomes dangerously entangled with Han Seol-ah, a flawless art auctioneer whose lovers all seem to die. As attraction and suspicion blur, he must uncover whether she’s a killer or a victim, before the truth costs him his life.

trailers.title: [세이렌의 노래 티저] 아름다운 그녀를 사랑한 대가 = 죽음?🥀 박민영X위하준 치명적 로맨스릴러 [세이렌] #세이렌 EP.0
